Uses of Package
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser

Packages that use org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.bean.hal
Juneau @Marshalled types for the HAL (Hypertext Application Language) hypermedia format, also covered by draft-kelly-json-hal-08.
org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonapi
Juneau @Marshalled types for the JSON:API v1.1 wire format.
org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonschema
JSON Schema Data Transfer Objects
org.apache.juneau.config
Configuration Support
org.apache.juneau.examples.parser
Parser Examples
org.apache.juneau.marshall
Marshalling API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson
BSON (Binary JSON) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor
CBOR (Concise Binary Object Representation) marshalling support per RFC 8949.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections
Collections classes.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.csv
CSV Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hjson
Hjson (Human JSON) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hocon
HOCON (Human-Optimized Config Object Notation) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.html
HTML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.httppart
HTTP Part Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.ini
INI format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena
RDF Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json
JSON Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5
JSON5 Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5l
JSON5L (JSON5 Lines) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonl
JSONL (JSON Lines) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema
JSON-Schema Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.markdown
Markdown serializer and parser support for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.marshaller
Marshallers
org.apache.juneau.marshall.msgpack
MessagePack Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.oapi
OpenAPI Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.objecttools
Java Object Tools
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parquet
Apache Parquet serialization and parsing support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser
Parser API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.plaintext
Plaintext Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.sse
Server-Sent Events (SSE) marshalling support — text/event-stream.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream
Public low-level token-streaming API (pull parser + push generator) shared by every Juneau format.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.swap
Swap API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.swaps
Predefined Swaps
org.apache.juneau.marshall.toml
TOML v1.0.0 serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.uon
UON Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.urlencoding
URL-Encoding Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml
XML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.yaml
YAML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.microservice
Microservice API
org.apache.juneau.rest.client
Next-generation REST client — transport-agnostic HTTP client built on Juneau's serialization stack.
org.apache.juneau.rest.client.classic
REST Client API
org.apache.juneau.rest.mock
REST Server Mock API
org.apache.juneau.rest.mock.classic
Mocked REST client and supporting classes for in-JVM testing built on the classic Apache HttpClient API.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server
REST Server API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.httppart
REST HTTP Parts
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.remote
Remote service API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.util
REST Server Utilities

    Description
    ParseException
    Exception that indicates invalid syntax encountered during parsing.

    Class
    Description
    ParseException
    Exception that indicates invalid syntax encountered during parsing.
    Parser
    Parent class for all Juneau parsers.
    ReaderParser
    Subclass of Parser for characters-based parsers.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser used by org.apache.juneau.examples.parser
    Class
    Description
    InputStreamParser
    Subclass of Parser for byte-based parsers.
    ParseException
    Exception that indicates invalid syntax encountered during parsing.
    Parser
    Parent class for all Juneau parsers.
    ParserPipe
    A wrapper around an object that a parser reads its input from.
    ParserSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of Parser.

    Class
    Description

    Exception that indicates invalid syntax encountered during parsing.

    Class
    Description
    InputStreamParser
    Subclass of Parser for byte-based parsers.
    InputStreamParser.Builder
    Builder class.
    InputStreamParserSession
    Subclass of parser session objects for byte-based parsers.
    InputStreamParserSession.Builder
    Builder class.
    ParseException
    Exception that indicates invalid syntax encountered during parsing.
    Parser
    Parent class for all Juneau parsers.
    Parser.Builder
    Builder class.
    ParserInputStream
    Input stream meant to be used as input for stream-based parsers.
    ParserPipe
    A wrapper around an object that a parser reads its input from.
    ParserSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of Parser.
    ParserSession.Builder
    Builder class.
    Positionable
    Interface for objects with positions (lines/columns/byte-positions for example).

  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser used by org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser
    Class
    Description
    InputStreamParser
    Subclass of Parser for byte-based parsers.
    InputStreamParser.Builder
    Builder class.
    InputStreamParser.DefaultBuilder
    Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed InputStreamParser.create() / Parser.copy() path.
    InputStreamParserSession
    Subclass of parser session objects for byte-based parsers.
    InputStreamParserSession.Builder
    Builder class.
    ParseException
    Exception that indicates invalid syntax encountered during parsing.
    Parser
    Parent class for all Juneau parsers.
    Parser.Builder
    Builder class.
    Parser.DefaultBuilder
    Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed Parser.create() / Parser.copy() path.
    ParserConfig
    Annotation for specifying config properties defined in Parser, InputStreamParser, and ReaderParser.
    ParserListener
    Class for listening for certain parse events during a document parse.
    ParserMatch
    Represents a parser and media type that matches an HTTP Content-Type header value.
    ParserPipe
    A wrapper around an object that a parser reads its input from.
    ParserReader
    Similar to a PushbackReader with a pushback buffer of 1 character.
    ParserSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of Parser.
    ParserSession.Builder
    Builder class.
    ParserSet
    Represents a group of Parsers that can be looked up by media type.
    ParserSet.Builder
    Builder class.
    Position
    Identifies a position in a reader or input stream.
    Positionable
    Interface for objects with positions (lines/columns/byte-positions for example).
    ReaderParser
    Subclass of Parser for characters-based parsers.
    ReaderParser.Builder
    Builder class.
    ReaderParser.DefaultBuilder
    Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed ReaderParser.create() / Parser.copy() path.
    ReaderParserSession
    Subclass of parser session objects for character-based parsers.
    ReaderParserSession.Builder
    Builder class.

    Exception that indicates invalid syntax encountered during parsing.
